chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 120 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution of reference as appl: counsel not supply the copies not pay the process fees, hence notices not issued. 02.02.2026 This matter is pending since 2017 without any progress and remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Today applicant remains unrepresented without intimation and / or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
